summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all major requirements with good pytest practices and strong end-to-end testing through act. Well-organized with proper isolation, clear test names, and both happy/sad paths tested. Missing some edge cases: empty test files, JSON with missing/invalid status fields, classname without name in XML, pipe characters in messages, unicode handling, and tests with zero tests. The act testing infrastructure is sophisticated but complex; some test functions are quite long (e.g., _run_act_for_fixture combines copy, git init, and act execution). Would reliably catch regressions in core functionality and workflow integration, but some boundary conditions could slip through.
